probability.title: Probability of being tamed
probability.description:
The chance of taming the entity with each item use between 0.0 and 1.0, where 1.0 is 100%

Sample values:
• parrot: 0.33

tameItems.title: List of items that can be fed to an entity to tame them

tame_event.title: Event to fire when the entity is tamed

tame_items.title: Tame Items
tame_items.description:
The list of items that can be used to tame this entity

Sample values:
• parrot: ["wheat_seeds","pumpkin_seeds","melon_seeds","b...
